content.en:
Just when Ye Tian was disappointed, the Qinya Realm Lord said: "Although I don't have the Will Peerless Study, I have a research material on the Will Peerless Sect, which is a huge force's research on the Will Peerless Sect, although the research has not been successful, but it also has a lot of value. If the Ye Tian Realm Lord wants, he can take out the treasure and trade. "

"Qinya Realm Lord open a price!"

Ye Tian said.

The Lord of the Qin Ya Realm said: "Ordinary treasures are useless to me, treasures that can help me improve my strength, I only need them, otherwise I am not willing to trade." "

"How about a drop of the Four Realms and multiple refinement essences?"

Ye Tian proposed.

"You actually have more maintenance refining essence in the four realms?" The Qinya Realm Lord was slightly surprised, how much Ye Tian repaired the refining treasure bottle, she would not be surprised, but if she wanted to condense the four realms and repair the refining essence, she had to absorb a corpse of the fourth realm!

It is difficult for the Fourth Realm to fall, and the corpses that have fallen for countless years are useless, and they must be the corpses of the Fourth Realm that have not been killed for a long time to be able to refine and condense the essence of the Four Realms.

Apparently.

Ye Tian had slashed the transcendent realm of the fourth realm, or he happened to encounter a fourth realm that had fallen not long ago.

"Okay, I agree!"

The Lord of the Qinya Realm responded.

Although a drop of the Four Realms Multi-Cultivation Essence can't make her cultivation skyrocket, it can also improve some of her cultivation, save a long time of penance, and just use the will peerless research materials that she doesn't need to exchange for such resources, why not do it!

That's it.

Ye Tian exchanged a drop of the Four Realms Multi-Cultivation Refining Essence for the multi-dimensional peerless research data in the hands of the Qinya Realm Lord, and after making sure that it was correct, Ye Tian took this research material and left.

......

"The research data of the Heavenly Blood Sect. "

He hadn't heard of the Heavenly Blood Sect, it shouldn't be a force on the side of the 5,000 Territory, it was most likely a huge force on the 4,000 Territory.

This research document records a lot of research on the study of will, even if it is all wrong research, but there are some experiences in it, which is very helpful for him to create his own will and mastery.

In addition, it also recorded many mysteries and effects of the Will Peerless Technique, which also made Ye Tian understand more and more about the Will Peerless Technique.

"The Absolute Doctrine of Will is terrifying, not only can you kill an extradimensional realm, but you can also kill the opponent's clone or body through the infinite territory. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, this method of bombarding the opponent's body across countless territories will continue to decrease as the distance goes further or there are isolation methods.

If the opponent is hiding in some special place, even if it is a powerful will mastery, it will be difficult to kill the opponent's body.

However, there are very few extradimensional realms with clones, and they are still hidden in special places, so it is even rarer.

"There are some special forbidden areas in the extradimensional realm, even if it is an extradimensional realm with many clones, if the clone explores, it is possible to be killed by the body. "

Ye Tian also has experience in this regard.

His replica body used to often explore treasures in various places, and he encountered many desperate dangers, not only was the replica body killed, but there was also an inexplicable force that wanted to erase his body, but because that power was limited, it did not hurt his other replica bodies.

Of course, the main reason is that there is a separate individual between the copy body and the copy body, and he has also practiced the Great Realm Armor Technique, which has caused him to never encounter this kind of danger again.

But he is not afraid, it does not mean that other extradimensional realms are not afraid.

And after learning the will mastery, the benefits must be many, and even if you meet other strong people who can learn the will in the future, you can also resist the other party's will mastery, so as to save your life.

......

In the following years, Ye Tian mainly studied the study of will.

With this research material, and with the assistance of the Will Stone, his research efficiency is getting higher and higher.

Moreover, Ye Tian still has multiple copies of his body to try, and he is not afraid of hurting his soul will potential, and he is crazy to try himself, and the research progress is naturally getting faster and faster.

After a long time, Ye Tian's research results are finally about to be completed.

"The will mastery has been completed, although it is the sixth dimensional will mastery that has been preliminarily studied, but at least it is a good start!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The power of the sixth dimension will mastery is that it can instantly bombard the soul will that only reaches the sixth dimension's extradimensional realm, but it can also hurt the seventh dimension's soul will, but it takes many times to kill the opponent.........

"Many of the extra-dimensional realms in the fourth realm are the soul will of the seventh dimension, that is to say, no matter how strong their combat power is, they will be injured when they encounter my will mastery. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, the premise is that the other party does not have the means to resist the will to learn, otherwise it will not have such an effect.

And the most important point, his attack power can break through the opponent's defense, otherwise he can't even break through the defense, and it is difficult for the will to enter the opponent's soul will origin and kill the opponent!

Therefore, the effect of the Will Peerless Technique is still related to the user's strength, and if the strength is not good, even if the seventh dimensional Peerless Technique is comprehended, it will not be able to kill the ordinary Fourth Realm.

It's like a third realm who has comprehended the seventh dimension, if you want to rely on it to bombard a top fourth realm, it is absolutely impossible, even the opponent's defense can't be broken, at most it will make the opponent's soul will shock.

But Ye Tian's strength has reached the level of the top fourth realm, and when he encounters the super dimensional realm that is also the top fourth realm, if the opponent's soul will is still in the seventh dimension, then he can kill the other party.

That's the horror of the Willless Learning!

If he comprehends the seventh dimension of will, he can instantly kill the 2.1 opponent.

"You must comprehend the Seventh Dimensional Will Peerless Technique, and with the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Realm, it is enough to kill the top Fourth Realm Transcendent Realm in seconds!" Ye Tian thought.

Afterwards.

He studied the will mastery again, striving to create his own seventh-dimensional will mastery and pass the second test.

And this research has passed 600 extradimensional eras.

After such a long period of time, he finally studied the seventh dimension of the will mastery, and the price he paid was also very large, sacrificing a large number of copy bodies, and the resources consumed were a huge expense.

"This seventh-dimensional will mastery is named - Wumu Robbery and Killing Technique, after all, it is thanks to this Wumu realm master, otherwise I would not have been able to study the seventh-dimensional will mastery!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
